scope: Local Hermes OpenAI Agents SDK bridge hardening only; Helix/NAS/Postgres migration is explicitly out of scope.

authority_model.source_of_truth: repo-local tracking manifest plus native git history until GitHub Issues/Kanban are explicitly authorized

roadmap_items.title: Governed OpenAI Agents SDK bridge baseline
acceptance: Expose bounded review, execute, verify, run, and architecture lanes.
Return structured proof objects and sanitized receipts.
roadmap_items.approval_boundary: local repo code/docs/tests only; no push, no migration

roadmap_items.title: Sanitized failure receipts for SDK lane errors
acceptance: Failed lane attempts emit blocked-status receipts when local context is available.
Task/context are fingerprinted instead of persisted as raw text.
Error responses include receipt path and SHA-256.
roadmap_items.approval_boundary: local repo code/docs/tests only; no push, no migration

roadmap_items.title: Architecture workflow stage receipts and blocked aggregates
acceptance: Architecture stage failures return structured blocked aggregate receipts.
Live architecture smoke returns a structured aggregate instead of an unstructured tool error.
roadmap_items.approval_boundary: local repo code/docs/tests only; no push, no migration

roadmap_items.title: Project management and traceability manifest
acceptance: Roadmap items, local commits, receipt groups, and next actions are tracked in a machine-readable manifest.
The OpenAI Agents SDK quality gate validates manifest referential integrity.
External tracking integrations remain explicitly out of scope until authorized.
roadmap_items.approval_boundary: local repo docs/scripts/tests only; no GitHub issue creation, Kanban dispatch, cron, or push

roadmap_items.title: Native git workflow tracking and local-first PR readiness
acceptance: Manifest declares native git workflow source of truth and PR readiness boundaries.
Quality gate validates git workflow fields, local commit refs, branch/remote expectations, and allowed untracked paths.
External git/GitHub actions remain blocked until explicitly authorized.
roadmap_items.approval_boundary: local repo docs/scripts/tests only; no fetch/rebase/push/GitHub issue/PR creation without explicit scope

roadmap_items.title: Generic SDK structured-output retry and recovery
acceptance: Review, execute, and verify lanes retry once after retryable structured-output failures.
First failure writes a sanitized blocked-status receipt before retry.
Successful retry responses include retry metadata and first-failure receipt hash.
roadmap_items.approval_boundary: local repo code/docs/tests only; no push, no migration

receipt_groups.description: Bounded live verify-lane smoke receipts under HERMES_HOME receipts/openai_agents.
Sanitized blocked-status receipts for SDK lane failures.
Architecture workflow aggregate receipts with stage status and stage receipt/error details.
Deterministic local quality gate output for SDK hardening work.

next_actions.title: Commit project tracking manifest and gate validation
Decide whether to bridge this local tracker into GitHub Issues or Hermes Kanban
Rebase/update against upstream main before any push or PR
Wire native git workflow validation into project tracking gate
Implement generic structured-output retry for SDK lanes

git_workflow.branch_strategy: local commits first; create issue-scoped branch before push/PR when external scope is authorized
pre_push_required_commands: git diff --check -- plugins/openai_agents tests/plugins/test_openai_agents_bridge.py docs/openai-agents-governed-runtime-spec.md docs/openai-agents-project-tracking.json schemas/openai-agents-receipt.schema.json evals/openai_agents/governance_cases.json pyproject.toml uv.lock
git_workflow.current_tip_note: HEAD is intentionally tracked symbolically so the latest local manifest/status commit is covered without impossible self-referential SHA churn.
